allowedUseCases: 本轮有明确 Prisma migration 文件。
用户明确回复 migration 专用确认句：确认执行数据库迁移。
生产部署确实需要 schema 变更。
forbiddenUseCases: 没有 migration 文件的普通发布。

approvalChecklist.title: Dedicated migration confirmation phrase received
approvalChecklist.description: User must reply exactly: 确认执行数据库迁移.

approvalChecklist.title: Deployment confirmation phrases are not reused
approvalChecklist.description: 确认执行真实部署命令 and 确认部署验证页 do not authorize database migration.

approvalChecklist.title: Production release requires a schema change
approvalChecklist.description: Migration release mode is allowed only when the production release cannot work without a reviewed schema change.

preMigrationChecklist.title: New Prisma migration file exists
preMigrationChecklist.description: Confirm there is an explicit Prisma migration file for this release.

preMigrationChecklist.title: Migration file reviewed
preMigrationChecklist.description: Review migration SQL and Prisma schema diff before enabling RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE=1.

preMigrationChecklist.title: Database backup evidence confirmed
preMigrationChecklist.description: Record backup timestamp, location, and restore owner without printing secrets.

preMigrationChecklist.title: No critical table or field deletion confirmed
preMigrationChecklist.description: Confirm the migration does not delete critical payment, order, user, product, or revenue data.

preMigrationChecklist.title: No destructive SQL confirmed
preMigrationChecklist.description: Scan for DROP TABLE, DROP COLUMN, TRUNCATE, DELETE FROM, ALTER TYPE, and DROP INDEX.

preMigrationChecklist.title: Maintenance window confirmed
preMigrationChecklist.description: Confirm a release window and the person responsible for monitoring production.

preMigrationChecklist.title: Rollback strategy confirmed
preMigrationChecklist.description: Document app rollback, data restore criteria, and stop conditions before migration.

executionPlan.title: Set RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE=1 only for the approved migration release
executionPlan.description: RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE must remain unset or 0 for EBOS page, copy, report, Docker-only, or Nginx-only releases.

executionPlan.title: Run only the reviewed migration command
executionPlan.description: The migration command remains high risk and must be run only after the dedicated approval phrase and backup evidence.

executionPlan.title: Record migration result without secrets
executionPlan.description: Record success/failure, migration names, timestamps, and errors. Do not print environment values.

postMigrationVerification.title: Run post-migration smoke test
postMigrationVerification.description: Run smoke checks after migration and before marking the release healthy.

postMigrationVerification.title: Verify orders, payments, login, and product pages
postMigrationVerification.description: Confirm order creation, payment paths, login/session behavior, product detail pages, and revenue views still work.

postMigrationVerification.title: Refresh EBOS reports after verification
postMigrationVerification.description: Regenerate EBOS weekly/monthly reports only after observed migration and smoke test evidence exists.

rollbackPlan.title: Application rollback version identified
rollbackPlan.description: Identify the previous commit/image that can run against the current or restored database.

rollbackPlan.title: Database restore criteria defined
rollbackPlan.description: Define when to restore backup, who approves restore, and how restore success is verified.

rollbackPlan.title: User impact and data loss window documented
rollbackPlan.description: Document the possible data loss window and customer-impact notes before release.

warnings: This runbook does not execute migration.
确认执行真实部署命令 does not authorize migration.
确认部署验证页 does not authorize migration.
Only 确认执行数据库迁移 allows entering migration release mode.
Do not print secrets, database URLs, cookies, tokens, or .env contents.
nextActions: Keep RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE unset or 0 for page, copy, report, and read-only EBOS releases.
Before any real migration, generate risk audit and attach backup evidence.
Ask for the dedicated confirmation phrase only after migration review, backup evidence, and rollback plan are ready.
